description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and defines a single build stage job named pages. In the build stage, the pages job runs only on the master branch, installs make and gnupg via apk, imports the GPG key from public/pubkey/0330BEB4.gpg, compresses public/contact.html to public/contact.html.gz with gzip -9, and runs make check. It then publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
